hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, os, pathlib, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); tool_input=data.get('tool_input') or {}; path=tool_input.get('file_path') or tool_input.get('path') or ''; scope_file=pathlib.Path(os.path.expanduser('~/.sldo/freeze-scope.txt')); scope=scope_file.read_text().strip() if scope_file.exists() else ''; allowed=(not scope) or (not path) or pathlib.Path(path).resolve().is_relative_to(pathlib.Path(os.path.expanduser(scope)).resolve()); sys.exit(0) if allowed else (print(f'freeze: cannot edit {path} - it is outside the frozen scope {scope}', file=sys.stderr), sys.exit(2))[1]"
